original_description: Five-phase orchestrator for iPix / FashionOS (linear.app/amo100, team IPI) — plan, research, implement, test, ship. Routes to child skills and slash commands. Use whenever the user works IPI issues, greenfield modules, wiring plans, forensic verify, sync Linear, scopes features, writes PRDs, ships platform work, says "implement IPI-NNN", "next task", or "close out Linear". Always use for multi-step iPix work. Do NOT use for one-off questions, trivial single-file edits, or non-iPix repos.
best_description: Five-phase orchestrator for iPix / FashionOS (linear.app/amo100, team IPI) — plan, research, implement, test, ship. Routes to child skills and slash commands. Use whenever the user works IPI issues, greenfield modules, wiring plans, forensic verify, sync Linear, scopes features, writes PRDs, ships platform work, says "implement IPI-NNN", "next task", or "close out Linear". Always use for multi-step iPix work. Do NOT use for one-off questions, trivial single-file edits, or non-iPix repos.
final_description: Master lifecycle orchestrator for any iPix/FashionOS task tied to a Linear issue ID (IPI-NNN, PLT-NNN, UI-NNN, AI-NNN, DNA-NNN, COM-NNN) — owns plan → research → implement → test → ship end-to-end, plus the Linear ↔ spec ↔ code ↔ PR bookkeeping contract. Trigger on ANY issue ID paired with a work verb or lifecycle action: implement, start work on, write an execution/wiring plan for, open/ship/merge a PR for, resolve bugbot threads, update acceptance criteria, mark In Progress/Done, close out Linear, or "/task". Route here even when the ask only touches one phase — just a PR, just a plan, just a status update — because this skill is the front door that dispatches to the right phase and child skill. Also use for greenfield module scoping, forensic Done-verification, and Linear sync/backlog triage. Do NOT use for questions with no issue/ticket reference, trivial single-file edits unrelated to a tracked task, or non-iPix repos.

history.description: Five-phase orchestrator for iPix / FashionOS (linear.app/amo100, team IPI) — plan, research, implement, test, ship. Routes to child skills and slash commands. Use whenever the user works IPI issues, greenfield modules, wiring plans, forensic verify, sync Linear, scopes features, writes PRDs, ships platform work, says "implement IPI-NNN", "next task", or "close out Linear". Always use for multi-step iPix work. Do NOT use for one-off questions, trivial single-file edits, or non-iPix repos.

train_results.query: generate mermaid diagram for campaign matching schema doc
fix typo in README.md — one word change
implement IPI-46 — onboarding orchestration, branch ipi/ipi-46-onboarding, wiring plan in docs/linear/issues
close out Linear IPI-89 PLT-015 — merge PR, set Done, update acceptance criteria checkboxes
npm run supabase:verify-rls failed on docker test — debug SQL policy
what does CopilotKit useAgent do?
write execution plan for UI-002 brand hub intake — worktree, files, tests, rollback
ship the PR for IPI-127 copilotkit license token — verify matrix, resolve bugbot threads, update todo.md
open PR ipi/plt-004-env-validation with one-concern commit and paste verify output in body
/task IPI-23 start work — mark In Progress and run phase 2 research
how do i install node on ubuntu — not ipix specific
explain RLS policy on brands table — supabase question only

test_results.query: what's the next P0 task in tasks/plan/todo.md MVP queue?
scope MVP proof #6 for operator onboarding — cut features, link to mvp skill
draft changelog entry from git log since last release — release-notes skill
forensic verify IPI-268 campaigns schema before marking Done — task-verifier probes
add CopilotKit provider to app layout — copilotkit skill not full IPI lifecycle
run /lean audit — repo is slow, CI takes 15min
multi-step platform work: migration + edge fn + app UI for brand crawl — needs full lifecycle
create supabase migration 20260701120000_add_foo.sql with RLS for new table
